author: Ashutosh
name: TrigramHash + EMA-SWA + Int4 QAT (11 layers)
blurb: Three orthogonal improvements over the SOTA: (1) TrigramHash(2048,48) extends BigramHash to 3-token context windows; (2) EMA-SWA replaces uniform checkpoint averaging with exponential weighting (alpha=0.9) so converged late-warmdown checkpoints dominate; (3) Int4 QAT on MLP weights via Straight-Through Estimator adapts weights to the coarser grid during warmdown, compressing MLP ~2.4x vs int5's 1.88x and freeing ~800 KB to fund an 11th transformer layer. All three innovations are orthogonal — TrigramHash improves input representation, EMA-SWA improves weight averaging, Int4+depth improves capacity-quality tradeoff. Compressor: zstd-22.
_note: Fill in val_loss, val_bpb, bytes_total, bytes_code after running on 8xH100 (3 seeds).
